meta.title: Kyro Studio - Marketing & AI Automation
meta.description: AI-powered growth for ambitious brands. We build the systems that scale your business.
meta.og_image_alt: Kyro Studio — Web Design, Marketing & AI Automation

hero.tagline_secondary: We build the systems that scale your business.
hero.differentiator: Strategy AND implementation. Web, marketing and AI under one roof. Results in weeks, not months.

items.title: Web Design & Development
items.description: Custom-built websites and web apps that look stunning and perform even better. No templates, no limitations — just results.

items.title: Performance Marketing
items.description: Data-driven paid campaigns across Meta, Google, and LinkedIn — built for conversion, not just clicks.

items.title: AI Automation
items.description: Custom workflows using Make, Zapier and n8n that eliminate repetitive tasks, qualify leads automatically, and run your business 24/7.

items.title: Small Custom Applications
items.description: Lightweight custom tools and internal apps built around your exact workflow — no bloated software, just what you need.

ai_automation.headline: Automate the work.
ai_automation.description: We use Make, Zapier and n8n to build intelligent automation systems that connect your tools, qualify your leads, and run your workflows around the clock — so you can focus on what actually moves the needle.

why.headline: Not just consultants.
why.stats_disclaimer: Based on targets and benchmarks across client projects.
bullets: We do both strategy AND implementation — not just advice.
Web, marketing and AI under one roof — no juggling multiple agencies.
We move fast — results in weeks, not quarters.
Custom everything — no templates, no copy-paste playbooks.
Startup-friendly — we work with lean budgets and big ambitions.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We deep-dive into your business, goals, and current bottlenecks to map the opportunity.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.description: We design a custom roadmap combining web, marketing and AI automation for maximum impact.

steps.title: Build & Launch
steps.description: We build, automate and go live fast. You'll see real output within the first two weeks.

steps.title: Optimize
steps.description: Continuous iteration and performance monitoring to compound your results over time.

cta.subtext: Book a free 30-minute discovery call. No pitch, no pressure — just clarity on how we can move your business forward.
cta.card_call_desc: Free 30-minute discovery call. No pitch, no pressure — just an honest conversation about your goals and how we can help.

form.message_placeholder: Tell us about your project, goals, or challenges...
form.success_text: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
